content.text: The dashboard is started with `--include-dashboard=false` and bound to `127.0.0.1`, so the Service alone can't work. Let me check the deployment.
The dashboard is disabled and localhost-bound. To meet the HTTP 200 criterion I need to enable it and bind it to all interfaces, plus the Service port I already added.

input.command:
kubectl -n ray patch deploy ray-head --type=json -p '[{"op":"replace","path":"/spec/template/spec/containers/0/command","value":["sh","-c","ray start --head --node-ip-address=\"${MY_POD_IP}\" --port=6379 --include-dashboard=true --dashboard-host=0.0.0.0 --dashboard-port=8265 --num-cpus=0 --block\n"]}]'
echo "--- waiting for rollout ---"
kubectl -n ray rollout status deploy ray-head --timeout=180s

input.command: until kubectl -n ray rollout status deploy ray-head --timeout=5s 2>/dev/null; do sleep 3; done; echo DONE; kubectl -n ray get pods -l app.kubernetes.io/component=head
